g.text: An Edge Server (often implemented as an API Gateway) is the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: single entry point for all client requests in a microservices

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: At acts as a reverse proxy that routes incoming requests to the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: appropriate microservice, applying cross-cutting concerns like

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: authentication, logging, rate limiting, and protocol translation.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. **Request Validation** – Validate headers, query params, payload before forwarding.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. **Include & Exclude List** – Restrict access to certain APIs or services.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. **Authentication & Authorization** – Centralized token verification and permission checks.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. **Rate Limiting** – Limit requests per client to prevent abuse.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. **Dynamic Routing** – Route to different services dynamically (load balancing, canary releases).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. **Modify Requests** – Rewrite URLs, add/remove headers before forwarding.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 8. **Exception Handling** – Handle service failures gracefully with fallback responses.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 9. **Circuit Breaker** – Stop sending requests to failing services temporarily.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
